brief: The US imposes new forced-labor tariffs on over 80 countries, while the Middle East crisis escalates with Houthi threats and a rising US troop death toll in Iran. On the tech front, studies explore AI for creative writing and dementia care.
news_summary: Trump administration slaps tariffs on 80+ nations over forced labor; UN warns Middle East crisis 'getting out of control' as Houthis threaten Saudi vessels. A Pentagon list of US war deaths in Iran appears altered.
papers_summary: Research examines usability of conversational AI product advisors, smart glasses for creative writing, and ethical considerations of generative AI for dementia care.

en.brief: The US imposes new forced-labor tariffs on over 80 countries, while the Middle East crisis escalates with Houthi threats and a rising US troop death toll in Iran. On the tech front, studies explore AI for creative writing and dementia care.
en.news_summary: Trump administration slaps tariffs on 80+ nations over forced labor; UN warns Middle East crisis 'getting out of control' as Houthis threaten Saudi vessels. A Pentagon list of US war deaths in Iran appears altered.
en.papers_summary: Research examines usability of conversational AI product advisors, smart glasses for creative writing, and ethical considerations of generative AI for dementia care.

zh.brief: 胡塞武装威胁封锁曼德海峡加剧红海航运危机，美国对80多国加征新关税，中东局势持续紧张。AI取代工作的担忧升温，香港47人案前议员胡志伟在英险遭遣返。研究方面关注AI透明性与可用性、AR无障碍设计等。
zh.news_summary: 胡塞武装威胁封锁曼德海峡，全球12%海运石油贸易面临风险；美国以强迫劳动为由对80多国加征10%-12.5%关税；香港47人案前议员胡志伟在英险被遣返后获准入境。
zh.papers_summary: 研究探讨AI系统透明性与可用性权衡，以及智能眼镜辅助创意写作、AR无障碍设计对听障学生的支持。

todays_image.caption: Like Lobophora sp. drifting in murky waters, the ABC's drug trade episodes were pulled from circulation amid unclear veracity.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
